parameters.text:
={{
$json.run_mode === 'help'
  ? 'Report commands:\n\n/report — full report\n/health — health check only\n/speed — speed check only\n/help — command list'
  : $json.run_mode === 'full'
    ? '⏳ Started full report: health check + speed check.'
    : $json.run_mode === 'health'
      ? '⏳ Started site health check.'
      : $json.run_mode === 'speed'
        ? '⏳ Started speed check.'
        : 'Command not recognized.'
}}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, health_result: { status: 'skipped', skipped: true, summary: { total: 0, passed: 0, warnings: 0, failed: 0 }, checks: [], errors: [], warnings: [], artifacts: {} } } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, speed_result: { ok: false, skipped: true, status: 'skipped', status_title: '⏭️ skipped', telegramMessage: '', primary: {}, references: {}, results: [], errors: [] } } }];

conditions.leftValue: ={{ $('Build Final Text Report').first().json.checks.speed === true && !!$('Build Final Text Report').first().json.runners.speed_image_url }}
